prestazioni: Engine swap to a **H22A Type-S (H22A4) blacktop** from the JDM Prelude Type-S, featuring a **87mm bore x 90.7mm stroke**, 11.0:1 compression ratio, and **220 PS (217 hp) at 7,200 RPM** with a **7,800 RPM redline**. Pair with a **TODA Racing H22A billet crankshaft (87mm stroke)** and **TODA Racing forged pistons (11.5:1 CR)** for 300+ hp potential on E85.

Forced induction via a **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbo (0.63 A/R, 62mm inducer)** on a **custom Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate**, mated to a **Hondata K-Pro V4 ECU** with a **custom 4-bar MAP sensor** and **ID1000x injectors** for precise fueling. Intercooler setup includes a **GReddy Type-S front-mount intercooler (600hp capacity)** with **custom 3-inch aluminum piping** and **HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve**.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (CE5-specific valving)**, **Cusco 22mm front sway bar (adjustable)**, **Cusco 18mm rear sway bar**, and **Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings (full set)**. Braking upgraded to **Endless CC-R6 rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear)** with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** and **Goodridge stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Ascot CE5 widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated canards, and a **carbon fiber duckbill spoiler**), paired with **Work Meister S1 3P 17x9 +38 wheels** wrapped in **Yokohama Advan A052 235/40/17 tires**.

**J's Racing CE5-specific front lip spoiler** (carbon fiber) and **J's Racing rear diffuser** (polyurethane), combined with **Seibon carbon fiber hood (OEM-style with functional vents)** and **Spoon Sports rear wiper delete panel**.

**Custom interior with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Honda-specific mounts)**, **Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses**, **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede)**, and **Defi BF gauges (oil pressure, oil temp, boost) mounted on a **Spoon Sports A-pillar pod**.
